message:
refactor(tui): remove legacy help overlay, synchronize docs from keymap registry (br-1xt0m.1.12.2)

Remove dead code: global_keybindings() and render_help_overlay() were
superseded by KeymapRegistry.contextual_help() + render_help_overlay_sections().
Update tests to validate against the authoritative GLOBAL_BINDINGS registry.
Add sync-validation test ensuring help_entries() covers all GLOBAL_BINDINGS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
